result.reasoning: From the tool call history: Step 1 and Step 2 identify the destination city of the train trip as Braunschweig. Step 3 provides the population of Braunschweig in 2016 as 248,292. Step 4 rounds this figure to the nearest ten thousand: 248,292 rounded to the nearest ten thousand is 250,000. The answer is numeric, so no textual casing decision is required.
